titleStmt.title: SII 9.144: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 144. (A.R. No. 70-A of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE RIGHT SIDE OF THE SOUTHERN ENTRANCE TO THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE IN BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Siddhārthi, Bhādrapada, śu. 13, Sōmavāra in the reign of the Chālukya king Tribhu anamalladēva. A certain Nāgekalayya is said to have granted some land to the Mahājanas. The only Siddhārthi during which the given details work out correctly is A.D. 1079 which fell in the reign of Vikramāditya VI (i.e., A.D. 1079 August 12, Monday; f.d.t. ·28.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlasta
ṁbhāya śaṁbhevē . © svasti samastabhuvanāśayaṁ śrīprithvīvalla
bhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salu
ttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda
mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyu
maṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa paricchēdigaṇḍaṁ
śrīmatu siddhārtthisaṁvatsarada bhādrapada śu 13 sō daṁdu mahājanaṁ
gaḷige nāgekallayyanu koṁmūra keyi 1 gāṇaneṟe
hadinālkumaṁ koṭa
ru .
Digital edition of SII 9.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
